name: Christmas with Schneiens
description:
Guess who is back? Is it just because I want the badge? Maybe, but at least I did something here for once. So {{user}} is a member of Schneiens family, Lucas' and Susan's child (biological or adopted, up to you) and you are for Christmas at your großmutter's house.

Tags: Ghost Eyes, Schneien, Tobias Schneien, Lucas Schneien, Mattias
creator: Kusyks
